outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: CBS: Iran agreed to give up enriched uranium — Tehran immediately disputed the report
outlets.summary: CBS News reported overnight that Iran agreed 'in principle' to dispose of its HEU stockpile — a potential breakthrough. But Iranian officials including Mojtaba Khamenei disputed the report within hours, calling it 'inaccurate.' British Royal Navy separately staging mine-clearing drones for Hormuz.

outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Gaza school shelter strike kills 36 including 18 children on Memorial Day — one of war's deadliest
outlets.summary: Israeli airstrike on an Al-Ahli school being used as civilian shelter killed 36, including 18 children, and wounded 55. UN Secretary-General called it 'a horrific crime.' Memorial Day timing muted immediate US political response.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: Memorial Day: UK staging mine-clearing vessels as Iran-US ceasefire talks enter critical week
outlets.summary: British Royal Navy deploying mine-sweeping drones near Hormuz in preparation for a possible deal. Trump Truth Social: 'Our position has not changed. We are NOT in a rush.' Iran deal still unsigned with structural uranium impasse unresolved.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: CBS says Iran agreed to HEU disposal — Iran disputes report; UK Navy preps mine-clearing for Hormuz
outlets.summary: CBS report that Iran agreed 'in principle' to dispose of HEU immediately disputed by Tehran. Fox: Iranian officials say no agreement and Khamenei retains sole authority. UK Royal Navy preparing Hormuz mine-clearing operation.

outlets.name: Breitbart
outlets.headline: Trump Memorial Day message: 'NOT in a rush' on Iran deal — deal slips into next week
outlets.summary: Trump Truth Social on Memorial Day: 'Our position has not changed. We are NOT in a rush. Time is on our side.' Hawks see Trump holding the line. Iran continues to dispute uranium terms as Blockade Day 84 enters.

outlets.name: The Hill
outlets.headline: Gaza school strike kills 36 including 18 kids; Congress silent on Memorial Day as pressure builds
outlets.summary: Israeli strike on Gaza shelter school killed 36 including 18 children. No immediate congressional reaction on Memorial Day. Progressive Democrats expected to call for aid suspension Monday. UN emergency meeting requested.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Israeli strike kills 36 in Gaza school shelter; CBS Iran HEU deal disputed; UK mine-clearing — Day 87
outlets.summary: Day 87 Memorial Day recap: Israeli strike on Al-Ahli school kills 36 including 18 children. CBS reported Iran agreed to HEU disposal; Iran immediately denied it. British Royal Navy staging mine-clearing assets at Hormuz. Blockade Day 84.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Oil steady at $103 as HEU disposal report briefly fuels deal optimism before Iran denial
outlets.summary: Brent crude held near $103.54 on Memorial Day as the CBS HEU report briefly pushed prices lower before Iran's denial reversed gains. UK mine-clearing staging signals deal infrastructure moving forward despite political impasse.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: UK Navy to deploy mine-sweeping drones to Hormuz ahead of potential Iran deal
outlets.summary: British Royal Navy confirms staging mine-clearing vessels and drones near the Strait of Hormuz in anticipation of a US-Iran agreement. PM Starmer called for unconditional Hormuz access. Operation could clear mines within 48 hours of a ceasefire deal.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF strikes Gaza school shelter killing 36; CBS HEU report disputed by Iran; UK mine-clearing at Hormuz
outlets.summary: IDF confirmed strike on Gaza shelter school. Israel said it targeted Hamas operatives inside. 36 dead including 18 children. Iran denied CBS report on HEU disposal. UK Navy confirmed mine-clearing staging for Hormuz.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Israeli strike on Gaza school kills 36 including 18 children — UN demands immediate investigation
outlets.summary: Gaza Civil Defense confirmed death toll at 36, including 18 children, 55 wounded in Al-Ahli school strike. UN Secretary-General called it 'a horrific crime.' ICJ emergency filing expected. Israel said it targeted Hamas operatives in the facility.

outlets.name: Times of Israel (Briefing)
outlets.headline: Daily Briefing May 25: HEU breakthrough or bluff? CBS report vs. Iran's denial
outlets.summary: CBS News claimed Iran agreed in principle to dispose of HEU stockpile. Iranian officials, including Mojtaba Khamenei, immediately denied the report. If true, it would be the biggest nuclear breakthrough of the war. If false, it signals another propaganda cycle.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran rejects CBS HEU disposal report: 'Inaccurate, no such agreement was made'
outlets.summary: Iranian state media immediately rejected the CBS News report that Iran agreed to dispose of its HEU stockpile. Mojtaba Khamenei's office: no such agreement exists. Press TV: the report is 'Western disinformation ahead of talks.'

outlets.name: IRNA / Tasnim
outlets.headline: Iran denies CBS HEU report; Pezeshkian: 'No decision without Leader's permission'
outlets.summary: IRNA quoted Pezeshkian reiterating that all nuclear decisions require Khamenei's explicit approval. Tasnim: CBS report 'not based in reality.' Hormuz remains closed. Iran continues to demand recognition of its Hormuz management rights.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: CBS report on Iran HEU deal creates diplomatic confusion — what the denial tells us
outlets.summary: Iran International analysis: The CBS report may reflect a White House trial balloon or a negotiating leak. Iran's immediate and categorical denial — sourced from Mojtaba Khamenei himself — suggests HEU remains the core sticking point. A deal without HEU resolution is structurally impossible.
